_comment: Sample form submissions for a dry run. Paste either object's fields into the 'Submit a Support Ticket' form (or POST them to the form's test webhook) to exercise one branch of the AI Agent's decision.

auto_resolve_example.Subject: Password reset not working
auto_resolve_example.Description: The reset link in my email says it's invalid every time I click it. I've tried three times and I need access to my account today.

escalate_example.Subject: Overcharged on last invoice
escalate_example.Description: This month's invoice shows a $200 charge I don't recognize and it doesn't match my subscription plan. I'd like this reviewed and refunded if it's an error.
